name: work-with-you
installHints: Fork this repository, fill in the [Your Name] / ~/your-workspace / [your-namespace] placeholders, then install with `aiplus profile install aiplus-work-with-you --user --yes`.
Profile content describes preferences. It does not grant permission for dangerous actions.

doctorChecks.description: Profile bundle manifest is present and parseable.
Cross-project sync policy is present and parseable.

notes: This template repository is public and Apache-2.0 licensed.
Users who fork and fill in personal content (USER.md, MEMORY.md, sync/projects.toml, secret-aliases.tsv with real namespace) are responsible for keeping their fork private.
Public AiPlus release assets must not bundle a personalized fork.
This template lists alias names only. Secret values live in the Owner's password manager.
Profile files must never contain API keys, machine tokens, auth headers, provider payloads, raw transcripts, .env contents, or private file paths.
